change.note: Change layers compare WorldClim v2.1 baseline climate with WorldClim CMIP6 ACCESS-CM2 SSP245 2041-2060. Annual mean temperature uses future (tmin+tmax)/2 compared with baseline tavg.

climate.source_note: WorldClim CMIP6 downscaled future climate projections, 10 minute resolution.

recommendations.site_method: 0.25 degree cells ranked by high vegetable-target GBIF records/species and low vegetable-target Genesys coordinate-backed accessions in the same cell.
recommendations.crop_method: Vegetable-target genus ranking based on target species, genera, and families observed in GBIF, discounted by Genesys accession count.

sources.name: GBIF occurrence download
sources.note: Tab-separated occurrence records filtered to Papua New Guinea bounding box for mapped hotspots.

sources.name: Genesys PGR accession download
sources.note: MCPD accession records; map hotspot uses only rows with collection coordinates.

sources.name: WorldClim CMIP6 future climate
sources.note: Downscaled CMIP6 projections; first build uses ACCESS-CM2, SSP245, 2041-2060, 10 minute resolution.

sources.name: IPCC WGI Interactive Atlas repository
sources.note: Cited for IPCC AR6 Atlas transparency/provenance; dashboard climate rasters are from WorldClim CMIP6 for web-ready PNG cropping.
